description: A square graphic from the DHS 'Know2Protect' series, part of a 'Top 10 Tips2Protect' set. The background is a flat blue gradient (lighter sky blue at top, deep navy below) with cut-paper-style clip-art along the top: white clouds, a butterfly, a teal camera, a red-and-white life ring, a green popsicle, blue sunglasses, a watermelon slice, and a yellow sun. A yellow rounded banner with black bold text reads 'TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT.' Large white bold text at left reads 'TIP 9.' At center is a magenta and white line-art icon of a figure wearing a fedora and domino mask hunched over an orange laptop with an Apple logo. Large white centered bold text states: 'Warn your child that they should never leave a game to chat with someone they don't know on a different platform.' At bottom are the white DHS seal and the 'know2protect' logo (a speech-bubble mark) with the line 'Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation.'
notable_text: TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT; TIP 9; Warn your child that they should never leave a game to chat with someone they don't know on a different platform.; know2protect - Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation
